Indicator: SLOOS: Net Tightening — C&I Loans, Small Firms
Notes: Companion to DRTSCILM (large firms). Divergence = dual-speed credit cycle.

Indicator: SLOOS: Net Tightening — Credit Card Loans
Notes: Consumer credit availability. Tightening leads consumer spending slowdown.

Indicator: SLOOS: Net Tightening — Consumer Loans (Non-Credit Card)
Notes: Auto, student and personal loans. Broadens consumer credit picture.

Indicator: SLOOS: Net Tightening — Commercial Real Estate
Notes: CRE credit cycle; leads commercial property stress by 2-4 quarters.

Indicator: UMich: Index of Current Economic Conditions
Notes: Reflects assessment of present situation. Divergence from expectations = inflection signal.
Forward-looking sub-index. Fed Reserve conference board uses this in composite LEI.

Indicator: Philadelphia Fed: Mfg Business Conditions (General Activity)
Notes: One of the earliest monthly US mfg surveys. Positive = expansion; leads ISM by ~1 week.

Indicator: Empire State (NY Fed): Mfg Business Conditions (General Activity)
Notes: First regional Fed mfg survey released each month. Closely watched ISM preview.

Indicator: Richmond Fed: Mfg Business Conditions (Composite Index)
Notes: Mid-Atlantic manufacturing survey. Covers VA, MD, DC, NC, SC, WV.

Indicator: Kansas City Fed: Mfg Business Conditions (Composite Index)
Notes: Tenth Federal Reserve District. Covers OK, KS, NE, CO, WY, NM, MO.
